class MetadataResult(BaseModel):
    items: List[Dict]
    status: str

def get_metadata(item_id):
    # Correct: function returns a consistent, labeled object/model
    if not item_id:
        return MetadataResult(items=[], status="missing")
    data = fetch_data(item_id)
    return MetadataResult(items=[data], status="ok")
